description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult male figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and sharp, angular extensions radiating from the torso and arms. The head and facial features are relatively intact, but the body is unnaturally stretched and fragmented, with the arms and legs appearing to split and extend into jagged, planar forms. The clothing resembles a collared shirt and trousers, but the fabric is also warped and stretched along with the body. The overall appearance is highly abstract and surreal, with the figure's form breaking apart into geometric shards. The asset gives the impression of a person caught in a digital glitch or transformation, with limbs and clothing merging into sharp, planar extensions.
description: A highly distorted adult male figure with elongated, jagged limbs and angular extensions, resembling a person caught in a digital glitch. The clothing and body are fragmented and stretched into surreal, geometric forms.
description_view_0: The front view shows the face and torso, with arms and clothing dramatically stretched outward into sharp, planar shards.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the extreme elongation of the left arm and leg, with the head turned downward and the body fragmented.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the head and the full extent of the jagged, planar extensions radiating from the torso and arms.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the right arm and leg's distortion, with the body and clothing splitting into angular, abstract forms.
attribute_posture: highly distorted, limbs and torso unnaturally stretched and fragmented
